review_text: r, you have a very good teaching skill. Thank you!
From every week lab exercise ,could get better understanding in that corse Home work exercises are given, from this also we could get better understanding

At beginning I did not know anything about Java. So the first few lectures was hard for me. But your explanations on OOP were very clear and simple. Therefore after few practicals it was normal. Then I was not able to attend some lectures and now I have some problems. Otherwise your teaching methods and in class activities was so efficient and helped so much. thank you madam,
Tests are almost impossible, her grading is extreme, and so hard to understand. Avoid at all costs!
An easy teacher a few homeworks but no test. You will leave this class actually learning something.
No extra credits, no extra assignments. 1 test and 1 final. Tests are hard but based on the book. So if you read you should do fine.
is better if the electrical engineering students have a common room as it is really hard to do work together in the library due to too many students working there

you are a full time student, good luck because this prof gives a ton of work as if this is the only class we are taking, asks for too much detail, and VERY picky with assignments and writing. if you can, save yourself and avoid it! also many students complained about this prof outside this website so, that should def be a sign!

Work load is high,if she can focus on middle level students rather than top level lots of students that would be good teaching.For some examples, code was shown in class but it hasn't been uploaded to moodle. As a middle layer student in some days lecture was too speed.

The lessons are really hard to comprehend The recent handouts had the codes written in really small letters. It was a bit difficult to read them Sometimes it feels like the people who are already well acquainted with OOP go on with the lecturer while the others are left behind
Unfair; picks his favs; a right answer is the one which he agrees with; free thought is not allowed; not a very fair marker. AVOID HIM!!!

ful instructor. Intensely focused on theory and over-complicating subject matter to feed his own ego. Zero interest in students, arrogant, and more interested in failing students. Class average for midterms was below 70%, showing he can\'t teach the material he expects students to know. Avoid at all costs.
It is easy to study as seniors are helping us in practicals
Lectures were good enough to understand explanations were good. Examples were adequate but there might be some more excersises too
Not bad, even though I did not like the course material.
about the group project, it is better to give a specific role which is equal weight for each student.

very good teacher. However her choice in course materials is severely lacking. She\'s sweet and understanding. She moves the class quickly, which can be overwhelming at times. Fortunately the other two teachers move at a slower pace, so it all balances out. A good advisor too, if you\'re looking for one.

Every lecture was very useful. in-class exercises was really helpful. If the discussion is done for every in class exercise or if the answers are uploaded to the moodle, it will be more helpful. If possible please conduct tutorials.
Difficulty in finding correlation between the lectures and the lab sessions. Difficulty in identifying the requirement of the lab sessions and what task we need to do in the labs.

Course was great. Work load is acceptable. Continuos assesment tested my abilities well. I got Madam Marcia for my mid evaluation. Although I got low marks, it helped me to improve my ability, understanding my mistakes.

Overall lectures were good. But it would have been better if Design Patterns were taught as in the middle of the lecture series. Last three weeks wouldn't give us enough time to get our hands on design patterns.
Good. But can't see what u are writing in the whiteboard if we are at the back.
delivering answers for the lab session after lab.because we can check whether our idea is correct or wrong. I feel first 4 lectures were ok then i feel little speed
It's very good and motivate for us. We want more from you...
He is an excellent lecturer, I have ever seen.
If you do the reading, you will do fine on his quiz.
The in class and homework let me evaluate myself and gain better understanding
We can interact with TA individually. So we can clear our problems when we are coding. That is good. Tutorial class is also very good.

ofessor Goodman has not changed since these reviews started in 2003. Obnoxious amount of work. Taking this class online in conjunction with another class, with a fulltime job and a family is not recommended.
It's good we could have more learning on GUI building.

e is clearly one of the worse professors I have ever had. She doesn\'t understand the topic and therefore can\'t explain or answer simple questions. We hardly used the book and the test were nothing like the study guide or anything we did in class.
Loved the guy. Interesting despite the topic and always cracks jokes. Easy grader and throws a huge curve at the end of the semester.

ofessor Babula is darling. Just because he is such an adorable little man, don\'t be fooled. He knows his Shakespeare and you will too after you take his course. Very sharp, funny, seems a little shy, fair grader, makes Shakespeare come alive. I can\'t imagine anyone not liking him or his class.

I understood OOP concepts very well. lectures were so good. I struggle a lot with my game because I am new to java. i know you have no time to teach us java but it will be great if you can give some more advises related to the semester project in next lectures. thank you
Betty keeps it real. dig the berets she dons. pay attention and show interest. old school teacher that lets you use notes for exams
Each day practical submission helps a lot. The TAs helps a lot in the lab. Learning with examples make easy to understand.
e was very sweet and would help you if you needed it, but her tests were very hard almost all sentence translation! so if you arnt good at that then dont take this class!
She knows what she is talking about. She is very clear. This is exactly how a history class is supposed to be. Her tests are very easy.
workload of this module is high and there is a lot to self study
He\'s ok - projects thats all only 3 tests
Oracle is hard enough - Instructor was not helpful at all. The book wasn\'t great either. I learned by working together with other students.
The lecture series was good and well taught. Better if the work load(Syllabus) was less. It was very hard to manage such a work load with other subjects.
Tests are hard, but he helps you get prepared for them. I feel like I\'m learning. slowly. But I\'m learning. Thanks Prof. Bowman.
it was very use full for me. it would be better if he teach us another day
It is better if the presentation slides are provided before the lecture. Then we can study it before coming to the lecture.
Study the study guides, they are the test and the ticket to an A. Hard to understand because of his accent, but the class wasn\'t that tough.

no was the leader of my fig and he made it quite interesting. While the lectures seemed long sometimes, he was able to mix music such as Miles Davis with philosophy and make it totally mindboggling. Unno KNOWS how to give a good thoughtout speech.
Show up to class and take notes and you will have no problem passing this class.

Lectures were good! but it's better if the presentation slides were more descriptive.Some codes discussed in the lectures were some kind of difficult to understand since the time it was given was not enough.(since most of us are still learning to code in java). ------- Kindly request madam to conduct a tutorial class weekly hoping it would be very significant to those who are week in Oop concepts. Thank you.
The majority of the exam had content on it that was not covered very well. I hope you understand math and word problems if you take him.
